import pytest
from source import sqrt

def test_sqrt_convergence_check_uses_residual_not_approximation_error():
    result = sqrt(2, 0.01)
    expected = 1.41
    assert abs(result - expected) < 0.01, f"Expected sqrt(2) ≈ {expected} ± 0.01, got {result}"
